name: HazardModel
author: Flax & Teal Limited
description: A reusable hazard computation procedure (hydraulic, wind-field, seismic, thermal or crowd model) in the Aonach Mór resilience demo. Modelled as sosa:Procedure so HazardFootprints can reference it via sosa:usedProcedure; maintained-by is expressed as prov:wasAttributedTo.
